description: The LegacyWorldThumbnailItem component is used to show worlds in the list of the legacy world facet.

fields.UpdatingUser: The user managing updating this component's functionality.
fields.WorldOrSessionId: The world or session ID this component is providing information on.
fields._visited: Whether the World has been visited by ``UpdatingUser``.
fields._totalActiveUsers: The total focused and active users in the world.
fields._totalContacts: The total amount of users on the world that are contacts of ``UpdatingUser``.
fields.PressAction: The action to preform when clicking on this item.
fields._thumbnailGraphic: The component handling the Thumbnail graphic.
fields._thumbnailTexture: The component handling the Thumbnail texture.
fields._nameRoot: The component that is the graphic rectangle handler for the world name.
fields._detailRoot: The component that is the graphic rectangle handler for the world details.
fields._visitedRoot: The component that is the graphic rectangle handler for the world visited status.
fields._counterRoot: The component that is the graphic rectangle handler for the world active users and contacts amount.
fields._iconsRoot: The component that is the graphic rectangle handler for the world icons.
fields._closeButton: The component that is the graphic rectangle handler for the world close button.
fields._nameText: The text showing the world name.
fields._detailText: The text showing the world details.
fields._counterText: The text showing the world active user/contacts.
fields._borderOverlay: The image UIX component handling the border graphic
fields._borderColor: The color the border should be.

methods.OnClose: Called when the close button is touched.
